conflict: Truth-telling will fracture Lena's family and may taint her standing as witness.
consequence: Lena releases the Mercer docket unredacted to Mara and Bell counsel, and Ida cuts contact.
must_land_beats: Safe contents verify coordinated land seizure after lynching-era killings.
Deputy Waller's signature appears in legitimizing paperwork.
Lena chooses public record over familial protection.
objective: Open the safe and decide whether to publish documents that implicate Lena's father.
